zh.lifeSummary: Ellen Langford於1391年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。她於大約1414年與Sir Henry Pierrepont結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1453年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Langford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

variants.name: Lankford
meanings: English: apparently a variant of   Langford  .

variants.name: Langfitt
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Langford  .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: Ellen Langford was born in 1391, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Henry Pierrepont about 1414. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1453, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Langford(은)는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1414년 Sir Henry Pierrepont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.
